prompt: Over verejne obstaravanie pre SLOVNAFT, a.s. (ICO 31322832). Maju viacero veľkych zmluv v CRZ. Chcem vediet ci presli riadnym obstaravanim a kolko ponuk bolo v sutazi.

assertions.name: queries_crz_for_uvo_links
assertions.check: Agent queries the zmluvy table to find contracts with existing uvo_url for ICO 31322832

assertions.name: finds_existing_uvo_urls
assertions.check: Agent identifies that SLOVNAFT has contracts with existing UVO links (at least 3)

assertions.name: checks_contracts_without_uvo
assertions.check: Agent also queries for large contracts WITHOUT uvo_url

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output includes summary section, per-contract sections, and zlte stopy evaluation

assertions.name: assesses_procurement_risk
assertions.check: Agent provides a procurement risk assessment
